ui.site_title: Soul Grimoire - The Grimoire of Souls
ui.main_subtitle: Answer four questions, and the forgotten story of your soul will be unveiled.
ui.q1_text: In what do you place your faith: the "Law" inscribed upon ancient stone, or the "Verse" whispered among nameless souls?
ui.q2_text: A wall that reaches the heavens appears before you. How do you overcome it?
ui.q2_optionA: I analyze its structure to find the single weakest point. (Analysis)
ui.q2_optionB: I strike it with pure passion, forging a path through trial and error. (Action)
ui.q3_title: Question III: The Soul's Deepest Desire
ui.q3_text: An omniscient sage asks, "In exchange for your soul's essence, what do you desire?"
ui.q3_optionA: The "Forbidden Knowledge" to comprehend the fabric of this world. (Quest)
ui.q3_optionB: An "Eternal Twilight" to spend with those you hold dear. (Harmony)
ui.q3_optionC: The "Act of Creation" to bring forth something from the void that none have ever witnessed. (Creation)
ui.q3_optionD: The "Power of Revolution" to overturn even the destiny of the stars. (Revolution)
ui.q4_title: Question IV: A Landscape of Serenity
ui.q4_text: At the end of an eternal journey, where does your soul find its rest?
ui.q4_optionA: The deep "Silent Forest" where all things began.
ui.q4_optionB: The vast "Boundary Ocean" that washes all away.
ui.q4_optionC: The crystal-clear "Celestial Sphere" under a shower of stars.
ui.q4_optionD: The endless "Earthen Plains" that pulse with the world's heartbeat.
ui.result_title: The Archetype of Your Soul - Soul Grimoire
ui.result_chapter3_title: Chapter III: The Keyword You Weave

A-A-A-A.overview: Seeker of Truth, your soul is a World Tree where the knowledge of all creation resides. You plant your roots in ordered logic, and with the winds of the unknown, you grow the leaves of truth.
A-A-A-A.chapter1: The Seeker is an existence born from the fusion of a Sage's intellect and an unquenchable thirst for the unknown. You find supreme joy in deeply analyzing existing knowledge to uncover the hidden laws and truths veiled within.
A-A-A-A.chapter2: The element of Wind grants you freedom of thought and skill in communication. It does not permit you to stay in one place, compelling you to constantly seek new knowledge and human connection, gathering fragments of truth along the way.
A-A-A-A.chapter3: What you desire is "Truth." The origin of the world, the foundation of life. To reach the answers to these intellectual questions, you will not shy away from any difficult research or exploration.
A-A-A-A.chapter4: The World Tree is where all knowledge connects. At the center of a silent forest, you logically ponder and explore the truths of all the world's phenomena, a true guardian of intellect.

A-A-B-C.overview: Sage, your soul is a tranquil garden upon which the light of the stars pours. You cherish the harmony of an ordered world, and like the life-giving earth, you value certain knowledge and the joy of creation.
A-A-B-C.chapter1: The Sage is a thoughtful being, possessing unwavering logic and deep insight. You are not swayed by emotion or chaos, calmly discerning the essence of things and always seeking the most rational and harmonious path.
A-A-B-C.chapter2: The element of Earth grants you stability and the power of creation. You possess a realistic perspective, finding value not in abstract theories but in steadily bringing tangible things into being.
A-A-B-C.chapter3: What you desire is "Genesis"—the act of creating order from chaos, the joy of bringing new knowledge and works into the world. You find fulfillment for your soul in nurturing what only you can create.
A-A-B-C.chapter4: The stars are the order of the heavens; the garden is a place of creation nurtured by human hands. You are like a gardener who, under the starlit sky, quietly contemplates and cultivates new beauty and knowledge while maintaining the harmony of the world.
